recommendations: Expand SET-09 and SET-10 ui_refs during implement using ir/slices/bTHDl__elements____remaining_children.json under ai_RNbBHYZR/ai_RNbBHYZp/ai_RNbBHYaP/ai_RNbBHYah/ai_RNbBHYay — include admin-paths-grid (ai_RNbBHYZX), admin-resources-grid (ai_RNbBHYZv), RG card templates, and edit/delete button ids.

Add AC or scope clause for admin edit-btn workflows (admin-path-edit-btn ai_RNbBHYZh, admin-resource-edit-btn, admin-plan-edit-btn, admin-workplace-edit-btn) — Bubble has no separate edit popups; document reuse of add popups in edit mode or inline edit parity.
Resolve crisis sidebar wiring: either add bTIfa CustomElement mount to SHELL-02 ACs or change SET-01 AC-3 to depend only on CRISIS-01 without claiming SHELL-02 satisfies bTIfa host.
Clarify SettingsPage.vue ownership: SHELL-09 lands route/shell slot; SET-01 populates content — avoid duplicate AC on same file without boundary notes.
Land SHELL-09, DS-01, ENUM-01, and CRISIS-01 before SET-01 implement wave.

critiques.finding: SET-09-admin-paths-and-resources lists 16 ui_refs for ~75 admin entities but omits admin-resources-grid (ai_RNbBHYZv), admin-add-resource-btn (ai_RNbBHYZs), admin-paths-grid (ai_RNbBHYZX), and card-internal edit/delete nodes (ai_RNbBHYZh, ai_RNbBHYZj, ai_RNbBHYZX–ai_RNbBHYZz) despite AC-2 requiring grid card templates with edit/delete actions.
critiques.alternative: Expand ui_refs to include both grids, both add buttons, and at least one full path/resource card template subtree from ir/slices/bTHDl__elements____remaining_children.json, or cite pointer /pages/bTHDl/elements/ai_RNbBHYdt/.../ai_RNbBHYZR in layout_notes.

critiques.finding: SET-10-admin-plans-workplaces-analytics has 13 anchor ui_refs for three sub-tab panels plus analytics stat cards (~75 entities per layout_notes) without admin-plans-grid, admin-workplaces-grid, or stat card ids (admin-stat-total-users ai_RNbBHYbA through admin-stat-enrolled ai_RNbBHYbO).
critiques.alternative: Add ui_refs for RG roots and stat card groups under ai_RNbBHYay, or document full subtree path from ir/resolver.json display_name lookups during implement.

critiques.finding: SET-09 AC-2 and SET-10 AC-2 require edit/delete card actions matching IR, but item scopes and target_files only list add-path/add-resource/add-plan/add-workplace popups — no AC covers edit-btn workflow parity or delete confirmation for admin CRUD rows.
critiques.alternative: Add AC-4 per admin item specifying edit opens prefilled add popup or inline edit per Bubble workflow cluster, and delete triggers confirm-then-delete via Supabase client; reference workflow ids from ir/slices/bTHDl__workflows____part_A.json.

critiques.finding: SET-01-settings-tab-router-and-header AC-3 states crisis card remains mounted via SHELL-02 bTIfa host, but bTIfa (CustomElement under ai_RNbBKLUe sidebar def) is not in SHELL-02-sidebar-navigation ui_refs or ACs — only CRISIS-01 is in depends_on.
critiques.alternative: Add SHELL-02 to SET-01 depends_on and extend SHELL-02 to mount CrisisSupportCard at bTIfa, or revise SET-01 AC-3 to reference CRISIS-01 export consumed by sidebar without naming SHELL-02 as satisfied host.

critiques.finding: SET-07-subscription-tab-and-billing ui_refs omit RepeatingGroup plan cell siblings (ai_RNbBHYYo–ai_RNbBHYYu, ai_RNbBHYYz, ai_RNbBHYZA) and style_ref on subscription-plans-grid while layout_notes cite ~42 entities and AC-2 requires tier badges from ENUM-04.
critiques.alternative: Expand ui_refs to all plan card roots under ai_RNbBHYYm or add layout_notes pointer to RG cell template ai_RNbBHYYn siblings in ir/slices/bTHDl__elements____remaining_children.json.

critiques.finding: Ten items state frontend migration but only SET-04 AC-3 and admin items explicitly forbid project/ writes; most tabs lack one-line out-of-scope for project/supabase and unnecessary adapter per implementation-constraints.
critiques.alternative: Append consistent out-of-scope clause per item: no project/ mutations; Supabase client from frontend; adapter only if server secret required (privacy export edge case).
